description: A second-year student needs to officially declare their academic major.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and confirm they have met the requirements to declare a major (e.g., completed enough credits).

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student is eligible.

nodes.task_description: Provide the student with the official 'Declaration of Major' form.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the form to the student's email.

nodes.task_description: Explain the process for getting the form signed by the department head and submitting it to the registrar's office.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly outlines the required steps and signatures.
